summary: Surprisingly good audience recording with solid bass response despite a tricky location
review: The lone review praises the unexpected clarity and bass response of this tape, noting that the sound is surprisingly good given the challenging placement on risers at the back of the floor. No musical performance details are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review; it highlights decent recording quality but gives no insight into the show, leading to a neutral overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear sound with good bass response despite being recorded from risers in the back of the floor; no major issues reported.
